# polytomic_dealcloud_connection (Data Source)

DealCloud Connection

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "polytomic_dealcloud_connection" "dealcloud" {
  id = "aab123aa-27f3-abc1-9999-abcde123a4aa"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `configuration` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--configuration))
- `organization` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `configuration`

Read-Only:

- `auth_method` (String) Authentication method Valid values: <code>api_key</code> (API key), <code>client_credentials</code> (Client credentials). Default: <code>api_key</code>.
- `client_id` (String) Client ID
- `host` (String)
